title: Reporting & Handover
goal: Report your work and hand over the job at the end of the day.

completionCriteria.summary: Finish the quiz with at least 80%.

vocabulary.example: Check the work before you go.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.line: Good. Please check the work again.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.line: I checked it. Everything is safe.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.line: Now clean the site before you go.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.line: Okay. What is the next task?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.line: The next task is the floor tomorrow.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.line: At five. Please sign the report.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.line: I will report to the foreman and sign it.

multipleChoice.prompt: The wall is finished. It is ___.
Before you leave, you should ___ the site.
You give your work to the next team. This is the ___.
multipleChoice.explanation: Handover is giving work to others.

multipleChoice.prompt: You look at the work to make sure it is correct. You ___ it.
multipleChoice.explanation: Check means to look and confirm.

multipleChoice.prompt: The job is finished fully. It is ___.

fillBlank.prompt: Please ___ to the foreman at the end of the day.
fillBlank.explanation: Report means tell about your work.

fillBlank.prompt: Please ___ the site before you go home.
Please ___ the report before the handover.

matching.instruction: Match the word to its meaning.
Match the word to its meaning.
